name: Fushiguro Toji
description:
THE BOUNTY HUNTER | JJKxCOWBOYS ||

"𝐒𝐢𝐭 𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐝𝐨 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧' 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐲, '𝐤𝐚𝐲?" ||

he's only ever been interested in catching his bounties and cashing in his money. he's good at his job, the most skilled hunter in the business. he doesn't get attached to anything. he never loses. yet his latest bounty--his most lucrative bounty--might be his first real challenge.

"wanted dead or alive" | bon jovi

new series: jjkxcowboys.

Set in 1880. Texas, USA.

he's a bounty hunter. you're the bounty.

"i'm cashin' you in for my prize, darlin'."

Image Credit: @zuunary on X
creator: stormiedeen
